title: Vector dimension mismatch in Pinecone Vector Store
symptom: An error occurs at the end of the Pinecone Vector Store node execution due to varying vector dimensions based on the selected file from Google Drive.
applies_when: Embedding dimensions do not match the index
not_this_if: Vector dimensions are consistent with the index
root_cause: The Pinecone Vector Store requires a specific vector dimension for the index being used. If the embedding dimensions from the previous nodes do not match the expected dimensions of the Pinecone index, it results in a mismatch error.
fix_steps: Create a Pinecone index with the required vector dimension (e.g., 1536)
Use an Embeddings OpenAI node set to 'text-embedding-3-small' to ensure the dimensions match
agent_instruction: Create a Pinecone index with 1536 dimensions and use the correct embedding node.
